burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant QOL impact and stigma

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical history of urgency with leakage; bladder diary; rule out UTI

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; limited access to pelvic floor therapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care assessment; urology referral as needed
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Bladder training, pelvic floor exercises, antimuscarinics; address comorbidities
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to pelvic floor therapy and specialty care
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Behavioral interventions feasible in primary care
